message:
feat: make crossterm optional and add runtime feature gate for wasm32 support

Gate the crossterm dependency behind an optional feature flag (enabled by
default) so downstream consumers targeting wasm32 or other non-terminal
environments can compile without it. Also introduce a "runtime" feature
gate on the facade crate to make the ftui-runtime re-exports optional.

Key changes per crate:

ftui-core:
- crossterm dep changed to optional = true, gated behind "crossterm" feature
- All crossterm bridge code in event.rs guarded with
  #[cfg(all(not(target_arch = "wasm32"), feature = "crossterm"))]
- terminal_session module gated behind crossterm feature
- Tests annotated with crossterm feature requirement

ftui (facade):
- New "runtime" feature gates ftui-runtime re-exports (App, Cmd, Model,
  Program, ScreenMode, TerminalWriter)
- Prelude split: core types always available, runtime types conditional
- TerminalSession re-export gated to non-wasm32 targets

ftui-extras, ftui-runtime:
- Dependency version and feature adjustments for compatibility

This enables building FrankenTUI's core event/widget types for wasm32
targets without pulling in terminal-specific dependencies.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -10,9 +10,10 @@ documentation = "https://docs.rs/ftui"
 readme = "../../README.md"
 
 [features]
-default = ["runtime", "extras"]
+default = ["runtime", "extras", "crossterm"]
 runtime = ["dep:ftui-runtime"]
 extras = ["dep:ftui-extras"]
+crossterm = ["ftui-core/crossterm"]
 
 [dependencies]
 ftui-core = { path = "../ftui-core", version = "0.1.1" }
